query:
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, billingPlatforms
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Action Smart%' OR name LIKE '%Envest%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%Action Smart%' OR businessName LIKE '%Envest%'
ORDER BY name;
